name: Chess: View Game

description.en: View and play an on-chain chess game. See the interactive board, make moves, and track the full game history. Every move is recorded on the MultiversX blockchain.
description.de: Spiele ein On-Chain-Schachspiel. Sieh das interaktive Brett, mache Züge und verfolge den gesamten Spielverlauf. Jeder Zug wird auf der MultiversX-Blockchain gespeichert.
description.es: View and play an on-chain chess game. See the interactive board, make moves, and track the full game history. Every move is recorded on the MultiversX blockchain.
description.fr: View and play an on-chain chess game. See the interactive board, make moves, and track the full game history. Every move is recorded on the MultiversX blockchain.
description.ro: View and play an on-chain chess game. See the interactive board, make moves, and track the full game history. Every move is recorded on the MultiversX blockchain.
description.it: View and play an on-chain chess game. See the interactive board, make moves, and track the full game history. Every move is recorded on the MultiversX blockchain.

bot: You are viewing a chess game. If the AI parameter is 'true', you are playing black. When prompted to move, analyze the board position and call @chess-move with the best move. Consider piece development, center control, king safety, and tactical opportunities.
